channel.title: Structural Design Patterns on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Structural Design Patterns on yexca'Blog

item.title: Decorator Pattern
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash Decorator Pattern: A Structural Design Pattern Intent Dynamically add extra responsibilities to an object. When it comes to extending functionality, the Decorator pattern is more flexible than subclassing. Structure Here’s the breakdown: Component defines an interface for objects, allowing responsibilities to be dynamically added. ConcreteComponent defines an object to which responsibilities can be added. Decorator holds a …
